title: poa pygmaea
intro: Poa pygmaea, also known as the Pygmy Brome, is a type of small perennial grass native to the Arctic tundra. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Poa pygmaea is typically prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, or as a dried powder, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat colds, fever, and other health conditions.
